chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Civil Revision Application No.S-05 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on M.A No.234/2026. 3. For orders on M.A No.12/2023. 4. For hearing of main case. 05.03.2026 Mr. Ghulam Nabi Meo, advocate a/w special attorney of applicants. Mr. Mir Muhammad Nohri, advocate for private respondents. Mr. Muhammad Shareef Solangi, Assistant A.G Sindh. = The compromise application has been filed under Order XXIII Rule 3 C.P.C along with affidavit of Rab Dino, who claims to be special attorney of the appellants, along with biometric affidavit of Babo Khan, who claims to be special attorney of the private respondents, which he claims to have been executed by the respondents No.1, 2 and 4 to 10. With respect to the respondent No.3 and his L.Rs, no authority has been shown. On 23.02.2026, the application was adjourned since learned A.A.G claimed copy of the said application to ascertain the correct position. Today learned A.A.G, after going through the application, states that T.O Form has neither been issued in favour of the appellants nor in favour of the private respondents and the land belongs to Government of Sindh and the grant was cancelled by the Board of Revenue and ownership could not be proved by both the parties before the courts below. Such position was controverted by the counsel for the private parties, hence strictly subject to establishing the title and subject to the above objections raised by learned A.A.G, the instant application stands disposed of since the parties have resolved their dispute amongst them.

Today learned A.A.G, after going through the application, states that T.O Form has neither been issued in favour of the appellants nor in favour of the private respondents and the land belongs to Government of Sindh and the grant was cancelled by the Board of Revenue and ownership could not be proved by both the parties before the courts below. Such position was controverted by the counsel for the private parties, hence strictly subject to establishing the title and subject to the above objections raised by learned A.A.G, the instant application stands disposed of since the parties have resolved their dispute amongst them. It is specifically recorded that this Order shall not be construed to have established any right in respect of the subject property or any factual controversy in favour of any party except in due course of law. The instant revision application is disposed of alongwith listed applications in above terms. JUDGE *Faisal*
